violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. - Prep cooler needs to be deep cleaned. - Side of equipment next to prep cooler needs to be cleaned.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. - Both hoods need to be cleaned.

Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. - hand wash sink on dish pit side not working, -dishwasher leaking. - Spray nozzle is leaking.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - Walls behind wing station need to be cleaned.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
